Sandbox_DynamicColonies.StarterWorkerCou: How many generated starter workers each player receives once. Multiplayer players each get their own grant before joining another colony faction.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyDailyCalor: Sets the fixed daily hunger reserve consumed by colony workers. This value is also used as the hunger bar's full-day target.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyDailyHydra: Sets the fixed daily hydration reserve consumed by colony workers. This value is also used as the hydration bar's full-day target.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyBaseCarryW: Sets the default body carry limit for colony workers before bag weight reduction is applied. Higher values let scavengers haul more before returning home.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyScavengeTr: How many in-game hours a scavenger spends traveling to or from the assigned scavenging site.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyBaseWorkAm: Sets the total work required for a scavenger to finish one loot roll. Higher values make each scavenging roll take longer unless the worker has better speed multipliers.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyBaseWorkMu: Sets the base scavenging speed multiplier before archetype bonuses and equipment bonuses are applied. Higher values make scavengers complete work faster.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyFishingWor: Sets the total work required for a fishing worker to finish one catch roll. Higher values make each catch take longer unless the worker has better speed multipliers or active bait.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyHealthRege: Labour: Home Health Regen Per Hour
Sets how much HP a resting worker naturally recovers per in-game hour before infirmary and doctor bonuses are applied.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyInfirmaryH: Scales resting HP recovery for workers assigned to an infirmary bed.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyDoctorHeal: Scales resting HP recovery when doctor treatment hours are available for the worker.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.ColonyBandageTre: Sets how many in-game hours a clean rag, sterilized rag, or bandage keeps adding healing after it is applied during rest.
Sandbox_DynamicColonies.CompanionCommand: How many tiles away a commanded Travel Companion can be and still answer a radial command.
